about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a Software Engineer passionate about building clean, maintainable applications. With expertise in Domain-Driven Design and Clean Architecture, I focus on creating solutions that are both elegant and scalable. Currently seeking opportunities to contribute to impactful projects.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out! I'll get back to you soon.
